rationale: Educ. Code §13.104 governs election procedures for detaching territory to create a new school district. It contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b). No operative conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 13.104. ELECTION. (a) Not later than the 30th day after the date the commissioners court receives a petition under this subchapter, the commissioners court shall hold a hearing on the validity of the petition.
_note: No conflict found. The rule text addresses school district detachment elections and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
